summary: Complete testing of new ClickUp-style operational dashboard features. All 22 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend flows verified working: /operacional page with manager filter and client cards, Gerenciar Equipe modal, Ver Dashboard navigation, /operacional/:clientId task dashboard with 14 template tasks, inline task addition, status/priority/search filters.

issues: No apply-template UI button visible in tested client (already has 14 tasks) - expected behavior, but new clients without tasks should show this option - not tested as the test client already had tasks

critical_code_review_comments: Server.py is 1346 lines - approaching the 700-line threshold for splitting into modules. Consider splitting into separate route modules (collaborators.py, tasks.py, operational.py) for maintainability.
list_collaborators filter only shows is_active=True - this prevents restoring deactivated collaborators via UI if needed.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_TaskClient (new client), TEST_Colaborador (collab), TEST_Inline Task (task in client_0a7adba7db)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new operational features tested and working. Backend uses collaborator_id (not id). Task dashboard at /operacional/:clientId loads template tasks. data-testid='add-task-inline' for + Adicionar Tarefa button, data-testid='inline-task-input' for the task input. Auth token injected via localStorage key 'agenciaos_token'. Known test client with 14 tasks: client_0a7adba7db.
